about.aboutMeContent1: My name is Riccardo Buzzolo, I was born in Cattolica (RN) on December 13, 1994. I have a solid technical background, starting from the
about.aboutMeContent3: studies at the University of Bologna (Cesena campus). My professional experience began with mobile development at Mango Mobile and operational analysis at Teddy Group. I then moved into a full-stack role at
about.aboutMeContent4: , where I worked on the development of management software and online booking platforms for the tourism sector nationwide. I am currently a developer at Quadra S.r.l., focusing on backend development with Symfony (PHP), custom WordPress solutions, and cross-platform mobile apps using Flutter. My goal is to keep expanding my technical toolkit to handle all phases of a project—from database architecture to the final UI—ensuring reliable and functional software for the end user.
about.aboutMyWorkContent2: , I specialize in transforming business requirements into tangible digital solutions, managing the entire software lifecycle from initial architecture to final deployment. My approach goes beyond mere coding; it is rooted in software engineering aimed at solving complex problems through elegant, scalable technology. My workflow is built upon three fundamental pillars, each selected to ensure maximum performance and maintainability:
about.aboutMyWorkContent4:
(PHP):
I leverage the Symfony Framework to build robust web applications and API-first architectures. By utilizing Symfony’s modular components, I handle complex business logic while adhering to SOLID principles and ensuring seamless data persistence via Doctrine ORM. This enables the creation of bespoke platforms tailored for high-demand enterprise environments.
about.aboutMyWorkContent6:
:
For projects requiring dynamic content control, I implement high-end WordPress solutions. Rather than relying on off-the-shelf templates, I focus on custom theme development and bespoke plugin engineering. This ensures the CMS is perfectly aligned with the client’s operational workflow while maintaining peak performance, rigorous security standards, and SEO optimization.
about.aboutMyWorkContent8:
:
On the mobile front, I utilize Flutter, Google’s UI toolkit, to build high-performance native applications for both iOS and Android from a single Dart codebase. Thanks to its declarative UI approach and widget-based architecture, I deliver fluid user experiences (60fps) and accelerated time-to-market, integrating complex hardware features and real-time data synchronization.
